ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation in meters */,
  "soil_type" INTEGER /* Type of soil (integer value) */,
  "horizontal_distance_to_roadways" REAL /* Distance to the nearest roadways in meters */,
  "horizontal_distance_to_fire_points" REAL /* Distance to the nearest fire points in meters */,
  "area_of_wilderness" INTEGER /* Area of wilderness surrounding the data point (integer value) */,
  "horizontal_distance_to_hydrology" REAL /* Distance to the nearest hydrology in meters */,
  "hillshade_3pm" REAL /* Hillshade at 3pm (float value between 0 and 1) */,
  "aspect" REAL /* Aspect of the data point (float value between 0 and 1) */,
  "cover_type" INTEGER /* Type of cover (integer value) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score or flag for the data point */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_cover_type FOREIGN KEY ("cover_type") REFERENCES cover_types ("cover_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_soil_type FOREIGN KEY ("soil_type") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil type */,
  "nutrient_content" TEXT /* Nutrient content of the soil type */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil type */,
  "moisture_retention" TEXT /* Moisture retention capacity of the soil type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cover_types" (
  "cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cover type */,
  "cover_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cover type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cover type */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the vegetation in the cover type */,
  "dominant_species" TEXT /* Name of the dominant species in the cover type */,
  "ecological_impact" TEXT /* Ecological impact of the cover type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g. researcher, collaborator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score or flag for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
